generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I've seen firsthand how vital civil defense preparedness is for national security. Our communities need robust emergency response systems—not just for disasters, but to deter threats. Let's ensure our tax dollars go to protecting all Americans, not just political priorities. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
